title: 竞媒小动态
scope: 过去 12 个月｜TikTok、Meta｜CPG：美妆、零售、食品

items.title: TikTok shifts destination marketing towards creator - led travel discovery
items.titleEn: TikTok shifts destination marketing towards creator - led travel discovery
items.titleZh: TikTok 创作者/内容合作动态：TikTok shifts destination marketing towards creator - led travel discove
items.summaryEn: The report covers TikTok's creator or affiliate marketing activity, focusing on how content is connected to commerce conversion.
items.summaryZh: 报道关注 TikTok 的创作者或联盟营销动态，重点在内容与商业转化的连接方式。

items.title: Keynote Address by Chef Marcus Samuelsson Headlines an Insight - Packed Educational Program at the 2026 Summer Fancy Foo
items.titleEn: Keynote Address by Chef Marcus Samuelsson Headlines an Insight - Packed Educational Program at the 2026 Summer Fancy Foo
items.titleZh: TikTok 营销动态：Keynote Address by Chef Marcus Samuelsson Headlines an Insight - Packed
items.summaryEn: The report covers recent TikTok activity related to ad formats and marketing plays, focusing on platform products, marketing formats, or monetization progress.
items.summaryZh: 报道关注 TikTok 与 广告玩法 相关的最新动态，重点在平台产品、营销方式或商业化进展。

items.title: Meta Launches New Era Of Shopping Experiences Powered By AI , Reels & Creators
items.titleEn: Meta Launches New Era Of Shopping Experiences Powered By AI , Reels & Creators
items.titleZh: Meta 推出由 AI、Reels 和创作者驱动的购物体验
items.summaryEn: Meta is combining AI recommendations, Reels, and creator-led shopping to shorten the path from content discovery to purchase.
items.summaryZh: Meta 把 AI 推荐、Reels 内容和创作者导购整合进购物链路，意图缩短从内容种草到商品购买的路径。

items.title: Thai beauty platform Konvy secures US$15 million from Cool Japan Fund
items.titleEn: Thai beauty platform Konvy secures US$15 million from Cool Japan Fund
items.titleZh: 泰国美妆平台 Konvy 获 Cool Japan Fund 1500 万美元投资
items.summaryEn: Konvy's new funding will support beauty retail expansion, showing continued cross-border capital interest in Southeast Asian beauty commerce.
items.summaryZh: Konvy 获得新融资后将继续扩张美妆零售业务，显示东南亚美妆电商仍在吸引跨境资本布局。

items.title: TikTok Shop honors standout creators at 2026 Creator Awards
items.titleEn: TikTok Shop honors standout creators at 2026 Creator Awards
items.titleZh: TikTok Shop 在 2026 创作者奖中表彰头部创作者
items.summaryEn: TikTok Shop is using creator awards to highlight commerce performers and reinforce creators as a core asset in its shopping ecosystem.
items.summaryZh: TikTok Shop 通过创作者奖项强化达人带货样板，继续把创作者表现包装成平台电商增长资产。

items.title: Zalando hires TikTok veteran to get brands to pay for marketing
items.titleEn: Zalando hires TikTok veteran to get brands to pay for marketing
items.titleZh: Zalando 引入 TikTok 老将推动品牌付费营销
items.summaryEn: Zalando hired a TikTok ad veteran to turn its traffic and shopper data into a stronger paid marketing business for brands.
items.summaryZh: Zalando 引入 TikTok 广告背景高管，意在把平台流量和用户数据进一步产品化为品牌营销收入。

items.title: Branded Buzz + Search Hubs
items.titleZh: 品牌种草声量 + 搜索中心
items.summaryEn: TikTok links scaled creator buzz with branded search hubs, giving users a path from feed exposure into search and brand-owned destinations.
items.summaryZh: TikTok 将达人规模化种草与品牌搜索阵地连接，让用户从刷到内容后继续进入搜索和品牌承接页面。

items.title: Symphony + Reference to Video
items.summaryEn: TikTok upgraded Symphony's AI video controls so product images, reference visuals, and placement timing can be built into creative production.
items.summaryZh: TikTok 升级 Symphony 的 AI 视频生成控制能力，让产品图、参考图和出现节点更容易被纳入创意制作。

items.title: Tag , Youre Liable : What Instagram New Affiliate Reels Mean for Retailers | Ballard Spahr LLP
items.titleEn: Tag , Youre Liable : What Instagram New Affiliate Reels Mean for Retailers | Ballard Spahr LLP
items.titleZh: Instagram 新联盟 Reels 对零售商的风险和机会
items.summaryEn: Instagram's affiliate Reels make it easier to route creator content into product sales while raising disclosure, licensing, and liability questions for retailers.
items.summaryZh: Instagram 的联盟 Reels 让零售商更容易把达人内容导向商品销售，同时也放大披露、授权和责任边界问题。

items.title: Meta trial raises stakes as possible exit from New Mexico sparks concerns for local businesses
items.titleEn: Meta trial raises stakes as possible exit from New Mexico sparks concerns for local businesses
items.titleZh: Meta 诉讼风险引发本地商家对平台退出的担忧
items.summaryEn: The Meta legal dispute raised service-availability concerns for local businesses that rely on Facebook and Instagram to reach customers.
items.summaryZh: Meta 相关诉讼引发平台服务可用性担忧，依赖 Facebook 和 Instagram 触达消费者的本地商家可能受到影响。

items.title: Walmart Has 23 . 6 % of U . S . Grocery Sales - But Costco Owns the AI Answer - 5W Grocery Retail AI Visibility Index 20
items.titleEn: Walmart Has 23 . 6 % of U . S . Grocery Sales - But Costco Owns the AI Answer - 5W Grocery Retail AI Visibility Index 20
items.titleZh: 5W 零售 AI 可见度指数：Walmart 占美国食品零售 23.6%，Costco 在 AI 答案中更强
items.summaryEn: 5W's index shows that grocery market share and AI-search visibility can diverge, with Costco over-indexing in AI-generated answers.
items.summaryZh: 5W 指数显示线下食品零售份额和 AI 搜索可见度并不一致，Costco 在 AI 答案中的存在感高于其市场份额。

items.title: Nykaa sued over alleged copyright misuse of songs on Instagram reels
items.titleEn: Nykaa sued over alleged copyright misuse of songs on Instagram reels
items.titleZh: Nykaa 因 Instagram Reels 音乐版权使用问题被起诉
items.summaryEn: Nykaa's Reels music lawsuit highlights licensing risk when brands use popular music and platform-native assets in short-video marketing.
items.summaryZh: Nykaa 因 Reels 音乐版权被诉，凸显品牌在短视频营销中使用流行音乐和平台素材时的授权风险。

items.title: TikTok launches international ad platform campaign
items.titleEn: TikTok launches international ad platform campaign
items.titleZh: TikTok 发起国际广告平台营销战役
items.summaryEn: TikTok launched an international ad-platform campaign to position itself beyond entertainment and closer to performance media and business growth.
items.summaryZh: TikTok 发起国际广告平台宣传，试图把自身定位从内容娱乐平台进一步推向效果广告和商业增长工具。

items.title: TikTok Shop on Track to Seize 10 % of Retail Sales
items.titleEn: TikTok Shop on Track to Seize 10 % of Retail Sales
items.titleZh: TikTok Shop 有望占据零售销售 10% 份额
items.summaryEn: The report argues that TikTok Shop's growth could shift retail traffic allocation and give content platforms a larger role in transactions.
items.summaryZh: 报道认为 TikTok Shop 的增长可能改变零售流量分配，让内容平台在交易环节中占据更大份额。

items.title: Vietnamese consumers spend about VNĐ63 billion per day on Shopee , TikTok Shop and Lazada
items.titleEn: Vietnamese consumers spend about VNĐ63 billion per day on Shopee , TikTok Shop and Lazada
items.titleZh: TikTok 电商/零售动态：Vietnamese consumers spend about VNĐ63 billion per day on Shopee , TikTo

items.title: FAQ on brand safety : How AI content and creator marketing are reshaping risk in 2026
items.titleEn: FAQ on brand safety : How AI content and creator marketing are reshaping risk in 2026
items.titleZh: 品牌安全 FAQ：AI 内容和创作者营销如何改写 2026 年风险
items.summaryEn: AI content and creator marketing are expanding brand-safety risk from media placement into asset generation, creator partnerships, and content review.
items.summaryZh: AI 内容和创作者营销让品牌安全风险从媒体环境扩展到素材生成、达人合作和内容审核链路。
